title: Hide Minimega Leaderboards
description: This mod removes the "Leaderboards" added by Minimega button from the Legacy4J title screen.
body:
# Hide Minimega Leaderboards

This mod removes the leaderboards button provided by Minimega from Legacy4J's title screen. It doesn't remove it from any in-game menus, so you can still access it while in a minigame.  It doesn't affect Legacy4J's leaderboard button either. 


Feel free to use in **modpacks**!


[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/H2H51ZR38L)
